posts.author: Feastie (Phil Scholefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

When creating a dashboard from multiple boards, I can’t sort the groups manually.
I may, for instance, want to see groups chronologically, by customer, by completion status or alphabetically.
It would vastly improve the usability of timelines.

Thanks.
